body:
## Rationale

Gavin Harrison is widely regarded as one of the most technically advanced progressive rock/metal drummers alive. MetalForge has \`whats-in-gavin-harrisons-kit\` (LLM file + gear profile) but **zero album-specific editorial article**. Porcupine Tree's 2023 return ("Closure/Continuation") and the enduring fanbase around "Fear of a Blank Planet" and "In Absentia" create a sustained, high-intent search audience distinct from the extreme metal cluster already well-covered.

**Query targets:**
- "gavin harrison drum setup"
- "gavin harrison drum kit"
- "porcupine tree drummer gear"
- "fear of a blank planet drum setup"

## Article brief

**Slug:** \`gavin-harrison-porcupine-tree-drum-setup\`  
**Type:** \`drummer-kit\` + album breakdown  
**Featured album:** *Fear of a Blank Planet* (2007) or *In Absentia* (2002)

**Drummer:** Gavin Harrison  
**Bands:** Porcupine Tree, King Crimson  
**Genre:** Progressive rock / progressive metal crossover

**Key gear (from drummer profile):**
- Drums: Pearl Reference Pure
- Cymbals: Paiste Signature series
- Pedals: DW 9000 series
- Known for multi-channel recording setup, precise brush/jazz hybrid technique in metal context

**Content requirements:**
- ≥ 400 words
- FAQPage schema JSON-LD with 3 Q&As targeting above queries
- Internal links: drummer profile + /llms/articles/gavin-harrison-porcupine-tree-drum-setup.md
- \`datePublished\` in albumArticles.js entry

## Files to touch

1. \`packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js\` — add article entry with slug \`gavin-harrison-porcupine-tree-drum-setup\`
2. Create article content via the standard article template
3. \`public/llms/articles/gavin-harrison-porcupine-tree-drum-setup.md\` — LLM markdown companion

## Quality gate

- ≥ 400 words in article body
- ≥ 3 FAQ Q&As verbatim-matching target queries
- Internal links: drummer profile + lick hub
- Album + gear specifics (not just general bio)
- \`datePublished\` set in albumArticles.js

## Estimated organic uplift

Progressive rock/metal audience is underserved vs extreme metal on MetalForge. "Gavin Harrison drum setup" and "Porcupine Tree drummer" searches have dedicated fanbase with high dwell intent. Compounds existing kit article + profile authority. Similar to Matt Greiner article (15 impr / 13.33% CTR) in progressive niche.

## Verify

1. \`/articles/gavin-harrison-porcupine-tree-drum-setup\` returns 200 with content
2. Google Rich Results Test shows FAQPage schema
3. Sitemap includes article URL + /llms/articles/ LLM URL
4. \`grep "gavin-harrison" packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js\` → found
5. LLM file at \`public/llms/articles/gavin-harrison-porcupine-tree-drum-setup.md\` ≥ 200 words

## Done

Article live at /articles/gavin-harrison-porcupine-tree-drum-setup with FAQPage schema + LLM companion file.
title: SEO: Gavin Harrison (Porcupine Tree) drum setup article — Fear of a Blank Planet / In Absentia
